subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you — it was a pleasure meeting at the conference, and we would definitely like to continue the conversation.

We have the following availability for a meeting:

- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Let us know which slot suits you and we will set up the invite.

As for the direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I am not in a position to share internal contact information. Any senior-level discussions can be arranged through this channel once we have our initial call and determine the best path forward.

Thanks again for following up, and looking forward to meeting.

Best regards
